nasb.text: They took away their cattle: their 50,000 camels, 250,000 sheep, 2,000 donkeys; and 100,000 men.

esv.text: They carried off their livestock: 50,000 of their camels, 250,000 sheep, 2,000 donkeys, and 100,000 men alive.

cnv.text: 他們又擄掠了敵人的牲畜：駱駝五萬、羊二十五萬、驢二千，以及人口十萬。

ccb.text: 他们从敌人那里掳走了五万只骆驼、二十五万只羊、两千头驴和十万人口。
